coreIssue: This 1:1 is likely about whether James still sees a credible Director-level path after being passed over for promotion.
openingQuestion: What feedback from the promotion decision has most shaped how you're thinking about your path and where to put your energy right now?
listenFor: whether he can name the promotion feedback in concrete terms or stays vague
whether he links the mentoring program to lead-level product scope or treats it as a separate lane
if they volunteer a specific ritual, project, or stakeholder where their engagement has changed
avoid: do not open by asking why his engagement dropped or why he stayed silent about the promotion decision
do not treat the mentoring program as automatically positive if it may be displacing Director-level product leadership scope
goodOutcome: You and James have agreed what Director-level product leadership scope will best strengthen his next promotion case, and whether the mentoring program supports that or needs tighter bounds.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of Director-level product leadership scope he could plausibly own so the conversation can test his interest against a real path.
